mapper.select: SELECT fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_code, fl.factory_line_name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_order_count, SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_count, COALESCE(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id), 0), 1 ), 0.0) AS achievement_rate, COALESCE(ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN eq.equipment_status = 'OPERATING' THEN eq.equipment_id END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT eq.equipment_id), 0), 1 ), 0.0) AS operation_rate FROM factory_line fl LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON fl.factory_line_id = ep.factory_line_id AND COALESCE(ep.is_deleted, false) = false LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON ep.equipment_process_id = eq.equipment_process_id AND COALESCE(eq.is_deleted, false) = false LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON eq.equipment_id = wd.equipment_id AND (wd.end_date IS NULL OR wd.end_date >= CURDATE()) LEFT JOIN matching_record mr ON wd.employee_id = mr.employee_id AND COALESCE(DATE(mr.work_start_at), DATE(mr.created_at)) BETWEEN wd.start_date AND COALESCE(wd.end_date, CURDATE()) AND mr.matching_status != 'REJECT' LEFT JOIN orders o ON mr.order_id = o.order_id WHERE COALESCE(fl.is_deleted, false) = false GROUP BY fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_code, fl.factory_line_name

SELECT fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name, COUNT(DISTINCT wd.employee_id) AS assigned_technician_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'INPROGRESS' THEN o.order_id END) AS in_progress_order_count, COUNT(DISTINCT eq.equipment_id) AS total_equipment_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN eq.equipment_status = 'OPERATING' THEN eq.equipment_id END) AS operating_equipment_count, COALESCE(ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN eq.equipment_status = 'OPERATING' THEN eq.equipment_id END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT eq.equipment_id), 0), 1 ), 0.0) AS operation_rate FROM factory_line fl LEFT JOIN equipment_process ep ON fl.factory_line_id = ep.factory_line_id AND COALESCE(ep.is_deleted, false) = false LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON ep.equipment_process_id = eq.equipment_process_id AND COALESCE(eq.is_deleted, false) = false LEFT JOIN worker_deployment wd ON eq.equipment_id = wd.equipment_id AND (wd.end_date IS NULL OR wd.end_date >= CURDATE()) LEFT JOIN matching_record mr ON wd.employee_id = mr.employee_id AND DATE(mr.created_at) = CURDATE() LEFT JOIN orders o ON mr.order_id = o.order_id WHERE fl.factory_line_id = #{lineId} AND COALESCE(fl.is_deleted, false) = false GROUP BY fl.factory_line_id, fl.factory_line_name
mapper.sql: SELECT fl.factory_line_id, e.employee_id, e.employee_name, e.employee_tier, MIN(eq.equipment_id) AS equipment_id, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT eq.equipment_name ORDER BY eq.equipment_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS equipment_name FROM factory_line fl JOIN equipment_process ep ON fl.factory_line_id = ep.factory_line_id AND COALESCE(ep.is_deleted, false) = false JOIN equipment eq ON ep.equipment_process_id = eq.equipment_process_id AND COALESCE(eq.is_deleted, false) = false JOIN worker_deployment wd ON eq.equipment_id = wd.equipment_id AND wd.start_date <= CURDATE() AND (wd.end_date IS NULL OR wd.end_date >= CURDATE()) JOIN employee e ON wd.employee_id = e.employee_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE fl.factory_line_id = #{lineId} AND COALESCE(fl.is_deleted, false) = false
mapper.select: GROUP BY fl.factory_line_id, e.employee_id, e.employee_name, e.employee_tier ORDER BY e.employee_name
